demographics.living_situation: lives independently at home; adult child present today providing support

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Every time I stand up the room spins, my stomach churns, and I just can't get out of bed. (Patient's adult child is with her and helping her answer.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It has got a lot worse over the last three days and I can't stand up without feeling like I'll pass out, and I can't keep fluids down.

symptom_narrative.onset: started getting worse about three days ago
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly three days of it building up, but I've had this sort of thing on and off for a while
symptom_narrative.character: dizzy and like the room spins when I stand, stomach churns and feels bloated, and a deep tiredness that won't lift
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really bad — I feel like I'll faint if I stand, so I've stayed in bed all day
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the dizziness is in my head when I stand; the churning and bloating is in my stomach
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the dizziness comes on the moment I stand up and eases if I lie back down
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying down flat helps the dizziness
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up, and trying to walk to the toilet
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling sick and bloated, full very quickly when I try to eat, and no appetite; too nauseated to drink much
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had flares like this before but not this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed today — I can't get to the toilet on my own without feeling I'll collapse

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: an autonomic / nerve condition that flares up from time to time
past_medical_history.how_managed: managed with a specialist; conservative fluid and salt measures when it flares

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: relies on my adult child to bring me fluids at the moment; very worried about falling if I try to get up to the toilet by myself

access_barriers.other: bedbound today due to fall risk; relies on adult child for fluids and assistance

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: read from a home cuff by the patient's adult child; single reading, device calibration unknown
home cuff reading taken while standing during a near-faint; single uncalibrated reading, prone to error
home blood-pressure cuff pulse readout; not a clinical monitor
home cuff pulse readout during near-faint; single reading
